changes.comment: BREAKING: replace the regex-only/sync safety pipeline with a pluggable async IScreener model. IPromptSafetyPolicy.screeners replaces suspiciousPatterns/screenedSources/onSuspicious (use createPatternScreener to reproduce the prior behavior); SafeguardFindingKind is now open (BuiltInFindingKind | (string & {})); ISafeguardFinding gains optional metadata + screener fields.
